subcodes.title: Words to a pilgrim, spoken on 1914-03-28
subcodes.first_line: Now the old believers should be satisfied with what they have... Some years ago there lived in New York a good believer by the name, Mrs. Helen Cole
subcodes.subjects: @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @personal instructions, @eulogies; reminiscences
